items.title: Gold rebounds from three-month lows as Trump delays Iran strikes
items.summary: Gold (XAU/USD) trims some of its earlier losses on Monday but remains down nearly 3% after falling to $4,098, its lowest level since November and near the 200-day Simple Moving Average (SMA).
